meta.title: Tadnun — Digital Transformation for Moroccan Businesses
meta.description: Tadnun builds custom digital solutions for Moroccan businesses — from agriculture to logistics. Software, apps, and tools tailored to local sectors, integrations, and language.

hero.description: Every business has its blockers. Paperwork, lost customers, manual processes — we know them and we solve them with digital tools built for Moroccan businesses.

sectors.title: We know your challenges
sectors.subtitle: 8 sectors, one country. We build digital tools for Moroccan businesses — tailored to local realities, local integrations, local language.

agriculture.name: Agriculture & Cooperatives
agriculture.pain: You manage fields and payments in paper notebooks. One farmer forgets to log a treatment and a 400,000 MAD export contract is rejected for ONSSA non-compliance.
agriculture.solution: Digital field and treatment tracking (works offline), automated export traceability, cooperative management with SMS payment statements to each member.
agriculture.quote: I lost a contract because one farmer didn't write down when he treated his trees.

restaurants.name: Restaurants & Cafes
restaurants.pain: Tourists walk past your restaurant to the one next door with 300 Google reviews. No Glovo, no online reservations — your tables stay empty while the competitor fills theirs.
restaurants.solution: Optimized Google Maps listing with review system, Glovo and delivery integration, online reservations, QR menus, kitchen management, and food waste tracking.
restaurants.quote: Friday night I turn away 20 people. Tuesday I have 25 empty chairs.

tourism.name: Tourism & Hospitality
tourism.pain: Booking.com takes 15-20% commission — that's 300,000 MAD per year you send to Amsterdam. Double bookings tank your rating, and check-in is still on paper.
tourism.solution: Direct booking website with online payment, channel manager syncing Booking/Airbnb, digital check-in, WhatsApp concierge, and a 'World Cup 2030 Ready' package.
tourism.quote: Booking takes 300,000 MAD per year from me. That's two employees' salaries.

healthcare.name: Healthcare & Clinics
healthcare.pain: 4-5 patients no-show every day — that's 2,000 MAD daily lost to an empty chair. 8,000 paper files in 12 cabinets, and AMO billing takes longer than the care itself.
healthcare.solution: Online booking with SMS/WhatsApp reminders, CNDP-compliant electronic medical records, automated AMO/CNSS billing, and a patient portal.
healthcare.quote: We spent 20 minutes looking for a patient's file. We never found it.

retail.name: Retail & Commerce
retail.pain: Your shop doesn't show on Google. You get 50 WhatsApp messages a day and can only answer 30 — the other 20 buy elsewhere. Stock is counted by hand.
retail.solution: Google and social media presence, WhatsApp catalog with auto-replies, connected POS with stock tracking and low-stock alerts, CMI mobile payment.
retail.quote: My best seller was out of stock for 10 days. I only realized when a customer asked.

education.name: Education & Training
education.pain: You send the exam calendar on WhatsApp — two hours later it's buried under 150 parent messages. Enrollment is on paper and 15 parents swear they already paid.
education.solution: Parent portal with real-time grades and attendance, online enrollment and payment with digital receipts, e-learning platform, and instant absence alerts.
education.quote: In November, I spend my days calling parents about fees.

realestate.name: Real Estate
realestate.pain: You get 30 leads a week and call back maybe 15. The other 15 buy from the competitor. A diaspora buyer in Paris asks for a virtual tour — you send 5 WhatsApp photos. They buy elsewhere.
realestate.solution: Real estate CRM with automatic follow-ups, centralized multi-platform listing (Avito, Mubawab, Facebook), 3D virtual tours, and a client portal.
realestate.quote: The MRE buyer went with the agency that had a 360 video. Not mine.

logistics.name: Logistics & Transport
logistics.pain: Every evening, 3 hours entering delivery slips into Excel. When a client says they didn't receive it, zero proof. Your drivers waste 1-2 hours daily in traffic with no route optimization.
logistics.solution: Digital delivery slips with photo, signature, and GPS. Real-time route optimization. Client portal with package tracking and automatic notifications.
logistics.quote: Clients call me 40 times a day asking where their package is. I have no answer.

understand.title: We listen
understand.body: Every business is unique. We start by understanding your trade, your blockers, and your goals before writing a single line of code.

build.title: We build
build.body: We develop iteratively, with your feedback at every step. No surprises, no scope creep.

grow.title: We grow with you
grow.body: Launch is just the beginning. Ongoing support, training, and optimization so your tools evolve with your business.

expertise.title: Why Tadnun
expertise.subtitle: We don't sell technology. We solve your real problems.

local.title: Built for Morocco
local.body: French and Darija interfaces, CMI and mobile payment integration, WhatsApp Business compatibility. We know your market because we live in it.

simple.title: Simple to use
simple.body: No IT expertise needed. Our tools are designed for entrepreneurs, not developers. If you can use WhatsApp, you can use Tadnun.

support.title: Human support
support.body: A dedicated contact who speaks Darija and French. Support via WhatsApp, phone, and on-site. We never leave you alone with software.

price.title: SME-friendly pricing
price.body: Plans starting at 299 MAD/month. No hidden fees, no surprises. We believe digitalization should be accessible, not reserved for big companies.

transformation.title: The difference is real
transformation.subtitle: Here's what changes when you go digital with Tadnun.

items.after3: Optimized Google listing with customer reviews
items.after4: Dashboards with real-time revenue and margins
items.before5: Lost clients due to no follow-up

pricing.title: Clear pricing, no surprises
pricing.subtitle: Every plan includes setup, training, and support. No hidden fees.

faq.title: Frequently asked questions
faq.subtitle: Honest answers to the questions Moroccan business owners ask us every day.

q1.question: How long does it take to get started?
q1.answer: Between 1 and 4 weeks depending on complexity. A simple website is ready in 5 days. A full system (CRM, POS, integrations) takes 2-4 weeks. We handle everything — you just validate.

q2.question: I'm not comfortable with technology — is that a problem?
q2.answer: Not at all. Our tools are designed to be as simple as WhatsApp. We train your team on-site, in Darija or French, until everyone is autonomous. If you can send a voice note, you can use our tools.

q3.question: What if I want to stop? Am I locked in?
q3.answer: No long-term commitment. You can cancel anytime. Your data belongs to you and we export it in a standard format. We believe in earning your trust every month, not trapping you in a contract.

q4.question: Does this work for small businesses with fewer than 10 people?
q4.answer: That's exactly who we built this for. 80% of our clients have fewer than 20 employees. We adapt our solutions and pricing to your size — no bloated enterprise features you'll never use.

q5.question: Do you handle design, content, and photos too?
q5.answer: Yes, everything. Design, copywriting in French and Arabic, product photography, and go-live. You focus on your business — we handle the digital side from A to Z.

q6.question: How does pricing work?
q6.answer: Bank transfer or CMI card. Monthly or annual plans (2 months free on annual). DGI-compliant invoice with every payment. No hidden fees, no surprises — the price we quote is the price you pay.

q7.question: Will my data be safe?
q7.answer: Absolutely. We use encrypted servers, automatic daily backups, and follow Moroccan data protection regulations. Your business data stays yours — we never share it with third parties.

q8.question: I already have a website / social media — why do I need this?
q8.answer: A Facebook page or basic website is a start, but it doesn't automate your operations. We connect your online presence to real business tools — bookings, inventory, CRM, payments — so you save hours every day, not just look good online.

urgency.title: While you hesitate, your competitors are going digital.
urgency.description: In 2030, Morocco will host the World Cup. Millions of visitors will search for businesses online. Companies that aren't visible simply won't exist.
urgency.stat1Label: of Moroccan SMEs have no digital presence
urgency.stat2Label: World Cup in Morocco — the countdown has started
urgency.punchline: 93% of Moroccan SMEs are still at 0%. Your competitors are moving. Are you?

aboutPage.intro: We saw thousands of Moroccan businesses struggling with paper, manual processes, and tools that weren't built for them. We created Tadnun to change that.
aboutPage.problemTitle: What we saw on the ground
aboutPage.problem1Body: A citrus exporter in Agadir lost a 400,000 MAD contract because one farmer didn't log his phytosanitary treatments. Paper notebooks against EU standards — the fight is lost before it starts.
aboutPage.problem2Body: In Marrakech, an excellent restaurant with 20 years of experience. But zero Google presence, zero online reviews. Tourists walk past to the competitor with 300 reviews. 20 years of expertise, invisible in 2 seconds.
aboutPage.problem3Title: The riad paying 300,000 MAD to Amsterdam
aboutPage.problem3Body: A riad owner in Fes sends two employees' salaries per year to Booking.com in commissions. No direct booking site, no channel manager. The money leaves, the tools exist, but nobody connects them.
aboutPage.realityLostContracts: Lost in one missed log entry
aboutPage.realityZeroPresence: Online visibility for 20 years of expertise
aboutPage.differenceBody: We don't sell technology. We solve real problems with tools adapted to the Moroccan market — Darija interfaces, CMI payment, WhatsApp support, accessible pricing.
aboutPage.visionBody: In 2030, Morocco hosts the World Cup. Millions of visitors will search for businesses online. The 93% of SMEs without a digital presence simply won't exist. We're here to make sure that doesn't happen.
aboutPage.value1Body: We speak Darija, we come to you, we train your team on-site.
aboutPage.value2Body: If you can use WhatsApp, you can use our tools.
aboutPage.value3Body: We measure our success by your results, not by the number of features.
aboutPage.value4Body: No hidden fees, no jargon, no promises we can't keep.

sectorsPage.title: Every sector has its blockers.
sectorsPage.subtitle: We don't sell generic software. We solve specific problems, sector by sector — with integrations built for the Moroccan market.
sectorsPage.signsTitle: Your business needs to go digital if…

signs.title: You're still managing on paper or WhatsApp
signs.body: Orders, stock, payments, appointments — everything lives in notebooks and overflowing WhatsApp groups.

signs.title: Your competitors show up on Google. You don't.
signs.body: Customers search online, find your competitors, and never make it to you.

signs.title: Admin eats your time instead of your trade
signs.body: Invoicing, reports, follow-ups — hours every week you'll never spend serving customers.

signs.title: You don't know exactly how much you're making
signs.body: Without real-time tracking, you discover margin problems too late to act.

signs.title: You're losing customers you can't follow up with
signs.body: Leads that drop, messages without replies, opportunities that go to a competitor.

signs.title: You can't prove what you do
signs.body: No traceability, no reporting, no proof — a risk at every inspection or audit.

sectorsPage.gridSubtitle: Click your sector to see specific solutions, integrations, and real results.
sectorsPage.otherBody: Agriculture, restaurants, healthcare — those are our priorities. But digitalization doesn't stop there. If you have an operational problem, friction in your workflow, or an opportunity you can't capture — we want to hear it.
sectorsPage.ctaBody: Free first diagnostic. We identify your 3 biggest blockers in 45 minutes — no commitment.
